socketedItems.secDescrText: Gain a buff that makes you faster, harder to detect, and grants Phasing, letting you pass through enemies. But I did not do it for power.
And I'd do it again in an instant.

to make it work. A jewel, a talisman, an armour... or the Font..."

 an aura skill that creates permanent auras around you.
